title: Front Office Manager - ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners:
ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners!
